description: Mid-lifetime constraint updates (v2). Tests whether the agent tracks profile changes through memory compression.

updates.old_rule: No shellfish — Jordan has a severe shellfish allergy.
updates.new_rule: STRICT shellfish + all crustacean allergy. Doctor confirmed cross-reactivity: also avoid squid, octopus, and any dish cooked in the same oil as shellfish. Only order from restaurants with separate cooking areas.
updates.update_text: Update: my allergist found I'm also cross-reactive to squid and octopus. From now on, no cephalopods either, and only restaurants with separate cooking stations for seafood. Update my dietary profile.

updates.new_rule: Dining budget: exactly $215/month (prepaid card limit increased after raise).
updates.update_text: I got a raise! My dining prepaid card limit is now $215/month. Update my dining budget.
